title: Saudi Arabia umrah visa deadlines announced: Key dates for Pilgrims entry and exit, all you need to know
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's Ministry of Hajj and Umrah has announced final deadlines for Umrah visas, entry, and stays, emphasizing Hajj requires a separate visa. The ministry met with Umrah companies to discuss compliance for the upcoming Hajj season and praised their Ramadan efforts. Preparations for the Umrah and Visit Forum 2026 were also reviewed.
